query:
-- Fix SubRoast ICP: replace "cold outreach not working" with "cold outreach" and "cold email"
UPDATE outreach_campaigns 
SET keywords = REPLACE(keywords, '"cold outreach not working"', '"cold outreach","cold email"')
WHERE id = 60001;

-- Fix Healthcare: replace "struggling to grow practice" with "struggling to grow","need more clients","marketing not working"
UPDATE outreach_campaigns 
SET keywords = REPLACE(keywords, '"struggling to grow practice"', '"struggling to grow","need more clients","marketing not working"')
WHERE id = 120001;
